iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 25% (stable). Day 21 14:04 UTC - No nuclear threshold events. 60% HEU under monitoring. Natanz destroyed. Mojtaba not seen publicly. Stable.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (stable). Day 21 14:04 UTC - Day 18 of Iran war. Hormuz paralyzed (1000+ ships blocked). Oil $100/bbl, down 3% on some transit. US strikes Kharg Island. Iran threatens Ford carrier. Iranian cluster munitions hit central Israel (damage, no injuries). Trump coalition failing (Europe flatly refuses). US allowing Iranian tankers through. Stable at ceiling.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 21 14:04 UTC - MAJOR ESCALATION: Israel launched formal ground invasion of southern Lebanon (March 17). IDF pushing on multiple axes, deeper into territory. Lebanese Army soldiers wounded in Israeli strikes — significant escalation. 1M+ displaced, 886+ killed. Beirut under aerial bombardment. Katz says displaced won't return. IDF chief: will 'deepen' operation. Near-ceiling.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 20 08:00): ZERO de-escalation signals across all primary theaters. Iran conventional: Kharg Island oil hub struck by US jets, Iran threatens Ford carrier group. Israel-Lebanon: simultaneous strikes on Tehran + Beirut, ground ops continue. No ceasefire in ANY theater. Only minor signal: UAE reopens airspace. Oil exports down 60%.

latest_news.headline: Israel launches formal ground invasion of southern Lebanon — multiple axes
latest_news.text: IDF launches ground invasion on multiple axes. Chief of Staff Zamir: will 'deepen' operation. Katz: displaced won't return south of Litani. Multiple neighbourhoods in Beirut struck.

latest_news.headline: Lebanese Army soldiers wounded in Israeli strike — state military hit
latest_news.text: 5 Lebanese soldiers wounded in Israeli airstrike on Qaqaiyat al-Jisr. IDF says it 'operates against Hezbollah, not LAF' — under review.

latest_news.headline: Iranian cluster munitions impact central Israel — damage, no injuries
latest_news.text: Iranian cluster munitions impact throughout central Israel. Damage reported, no injuries. First confirmed cluster munitions use on Israeli territory.

latest_news.headline: 1,000+ ships blocked at Strait of Hormuz — 20% global oil supply disrupted
latest_news.text: Over 1,000 cargo ships blocked from transiting Hormuz. ~20% of global oil supply effectively blocked. US conducting strikes on Iranian anti-ship positions.

latest_news.headline: Trump Hormuz coalition request gets zero military commitments from allies
latest_news.text: European leaders reject Trump's Hormuz coalition demands. UK circulating plan but no firm commitments. Starmer refuses to send warships.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 21 14:04 UTC) — Day 18 of Iran war. MAJOR: Israel launches ground invasion of southern Lebanon (multiple axes). Lebanese Army struck. 1M+ displaced. Hormuz paralyzed (1,000+ ships blocked). Oil $100/bbl. Iran uses cluster munitions on central Israel. Trump coalition fails. Russia-Ukraine peace talks frozen. No de-escalation in any theater.

predictions.description: Strait of Hormuz expected to remain under Iranian blockade. Additional shipping attacks probable within 12 hours.
Israeli ground operation in southern Lebanon expected to continue beyond Litani River. Further displacement and infrastructure destruction likely.
Status quo maintained. No PLA activity changes detected. Taiwan Strait remains stable.
Afghan-Pakistan border tensions likely to persist. Additional clashes probable based on recent trajectory.
RUSSIA-UKRAINE remains stable at current levels. No significant changes anticipated.
TURKEY-NATO remains stable at current levels. No significant changes anticipated.
No immediate nuclear threshold events anticipated. Status quo enrichment posture likely maintained.
